name: NIX.CZ Route Servers
notes:
Route servers:

* rs1.nix.cz - 91.210.16.1, 2001:7f8:14::11

* rs2.nix.cz - 91.210.16.2, 2001:7f8:14::12

Looking glass is available on the link https://birdspy.nix.cz for registered users only.

Route redistribution control and blackholing:

* (0:<Peer ASN>), (47200:0:<Peer ASN>), (rt:0:<Peer ASN>) - Do not advertise to <Peer ASN>

* (47200:<Peer ASN>), (47200:47200:<Peer ASN>), (rt:47200:<Peer ASN>) - Announce to <Peer ASN>

* (0:47200), (47200:0:47200), (rt:0:47200) - Do not announce anywhere

* 65535:666       BLACKHOLE

More technical info available on https://confluence.nix.cz
